phrases.phrase: Ἰούδας δὲ ἐγέννησεν τὸν Φαρὲς καὶ τὸν Ζαρὰ ἐκ τῆς Θάμαρ,
phrases.translation: Now Judah fathered Perez and Zerah by Tamar.
phrases.summary: The text states that Judah “fathered/begot” two sons—Perez and Zerah—through Tamar. It presents their relationship as the outcome of Judah’s parentage with Tamar.
The text declares that Perez “fathered/begot” Hezron, indicating Perez’s role as the parent of Hezron in the genealogical line.
The text states that Hezron “fathered/begot” Ram, continuing the lineage by describing Hezron’s parentage of Ram.
